events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the belt routing doesn't match the OEM diagram — an installed-defective condition at the rough-complete stage. Marked `fail`/`high` risk since running the engine in this state risks belt walk-off or (if it's the timing belt) cam/crank timing errors and interference damage; corrective actions call for re-routing per the OEM diagram and re-verifying timing marks before moving to test/inspection.
